name: Data Protection Mapping
description: Map data processing activities across contracts for GDPR/privacy compliance

columns.label: Counterparty / Processor
columns.prompt: Name of the other party (data processor, sub-processor, or controller)

columns.label: Agreement Type
columns.prompt: Type of agreement (DPA, MSA with DPA schedule, SCC, processor agreement, etc.)

columns.label: Data Role
columns.prompt: Is the counterparty acting as controller, processor, sub-processor, or joint controller?

columns.label: Categories of Personal Data
columns.prompt: What categories of personal data are processed? (e.g. names, emails, financial, health, location)

columns.label: Data Subjects
columns.prompt: Who are the data subjects? (e.g. employees, customers, website visitors, patients)

columns.label: Processing Purposes
columns.prompt: For what purposes is personal data processed under this agreement?

columns.label: International Transfer
columns.prompt: Is there an international data transfer? If so, what mechanism is used (SCCs, adequacy decision, BCRs)?

columns.label: Sub-Processors
columns.prompt: Are sub-processors permitted? Is prior consent required? Are they listed?

columns.label: Security Measures
columns.prompt: What technical and organisational security measures are specified? (encryption, access controls, etc.)

columns.label: Breach Notification
columns.prompt: What is the breach notification timeframe? (e.g. 24 hours, 48 hours, without undue delay)

columns.label: Data Retention
columns.prompt: What happens to personal data on termination? Is there a retention period or deletion obligation?

columns.label: Audit Rights
columns.prompt: Does the controller have audit rights over the processor? Quote the relevant provision.
